SectionHeading: Measurable outcomes for the human ecosystem.

ValuePropositions.Title: Cognitive Restoration
ValuePropositions.Description: Reducing "Directed Attention Fatigue" through soft fascination, restoring the group’s capacity for focus and problem-solving.

ValuePropositions.Title: Nervous System Co-regulation
ValuePropositions.Description: Lowering baseline cortisol levels and supporting steadier interpersonal dynamics through shared, grounded presence.

ValuePropositions.Title: Relational Resonance
ValuePropositions.Description: Moving beyond transactional interaction toward deep listening and psychological safety through shared somatic experience.

ValuePropositions.Title: Extra Example That Will Not Render
ValuePropositions.Description: This is here to demonstrate that editors may add more items, but the template only renders the first three.
